minor_notes: In the 'Pushing an image to ECR' section, the example `docker build -t my-app .` implicitly creates the `my-app:latest` tag, which is then re-tagged. This works, but is slightly inconsistent with the lecture's own excellent advice to avoid relying on the 'latest' tag. A clearer sequence might be to build with a more specific tag from the start (e.g., `docker build -t my-app:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) .`) and then tag that resulting image with the full ECR address, avoiding 'latest' entirely.
